architecture.web_app: Fly app accepts Instagram links and routes link-only analysis through the queue-backed worker path.
architecture.worker: Oracle worker performs browser-rendered Instagram ingest, authenticated media download, local Whisper ASR, frame OCR, and returns artifacts for final scoring.
architecture.auth: Instagram Netscape cookie export installed at /home/ubuntu/instagram_cookies.txt and activated via INSTAGRAM_COOKIE_FILE.

remaining_optional_work: Refresh YouTube auth material to reduce anti-bot fallback behavior.
Consider conditional Groq only for medium/high evidence cases after auth-backed ingest is stable.
Upgrade Oracle runtime beyond Python 3.8 when practical.
